title: So Fast.
description: ⚡ So Fast – Ultra-smooth Minecraft performance 🚀✨ Optimized FPS, fast loading, and silky gameplay! 🎮💨
body:
# ⚡ So Fast ⚡

Get ready for **lightning-fast Minecraft**! 🚀✨  
"So Fast" is a modpack designed to **supercharge your game** with ultra-smooth performance, fast loading, and silky gameplay. Perfect for explorers, builders, and speedrunners who want Minecraft to feel **blazing fast**! 💨🎮

## 🎯 Key Features
- ⚡ **Optimized FPS & Smooth Rendering** – Sodium, Iris, and more make every frame count.  
- 🚀 **Faster World Loading** – Lithium, FerriteCore, and C2ME reduce lag and stutter.  
- 👀 **Smart Entity & Chunk Culling** – EntityCulling & MoreCulling keep your game light and snappy.  
- 🎨 **Beautiful Graphics, No Compromise** – Iris + Sodium Extra for vibrant, smooth visuals.  
- 🛠 **Customizable Options** – Punchy, Dynamic FPS, and Reeses Sodium Options let you tweak your experience.  

## 💡 Why Play “So Fast”?
Minecraft should **never feel slow**. With "So Fast", every world loads quicker, every mob moves smoother, and every adventure is **pure speed and style**. Perfect for casual or hardcore players alike! 🌟🔥  

> “Faster than a lightning bolt, smoother than butter!” ⚡🧈

---

### 📝 Credits
Logo generated by **Copilot** using this prompt :
```
Create a modern, plumpy, and smooth lightning bolt logo for a Minecraft modpack called "So Fast". The logo should be simple, sleek, and dynamic, with no text. Use vibrant colors and smooth gradients. Background must be fully transparent (PNG format), high-resolution, vector-style, cartoonish but stylish, visually appealing for gaming branding.
```
